testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_393] Ensure AWS GitHub Actions OIDC authorization policies only allow safe claims and claim order on IAM role
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_61] Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow assume role permission across all services
[NONE][CKV_AWS_60] Ensure IAM role allows only specific services or principals to assume it
[NONE][CKV_AWS_62] Ensure IAM policies that allow full "*-*" administrative privileges are not created
[NONE][CKV_AWS_63] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's actions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy

[NONE][CKV_AWS_131] Ensure that ALB drops HTTP headers
[NONE][CKV_AWS_91] Ensure the ELBv2 (Application/Network) has access logging enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_150] Ensure that Load Balancer has deletion protection enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_261] Ensure HTTP HTTPS Target group defines Healthcheck
[NONE][CKV_AWS_2] Ensure ALB protocol is HTTPS
[NONE][CKV_AWS_309] Ensure API GatewayV2 routes specify an authorization type
[NONE][CKV_AWS_158] Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group is encrypted by KMS
[NONE][CKV_AWS_66] Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group specifies retention days
[NONE][CKV_AWS_338] Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year
[NONE][CKV_AWS_76] Ensure API Gateway has Access Logging enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_65] Ensure container insights are enabled on ECS cluster
[NONE][CKV_AWS_223] Ensure ECS Cluster enables logging of ECS Exec
[NONE][CKV_AWS_335] Ensure ECS task definitions should not share the host's process namespace
[NONE][CKV_AWS_334] Ensure ECS containers should run as non-privileged
[NONE][CKV_AWS_336] Ensure ECS containers are limited to read-only access to root filesystems
[NONE][CKV_AWS_97] Ensure Encryption in transit is enabled for EFS volumes in ECS Task definitions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_249] Ensure that the Execution Role ARN and the Task Role ARN are different in ECS Task definitions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_332] Ensure ECS Fargate services run on the latest Fargate platform version
[NONE][CKV_AWS_333] Ensure ECS services do not have public IP addresses assigned to them automatically
[NONE][CKV_AWS_2] Ensure ALB protocol is HTTPS
[NONE][CKV_AWS_227] Ensure KMS key is enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_33] Ensure KMS key policy does not contain wildcard (*) principal
[NONE][CKV_AWS_7] Ensure rotation for customer created CMKs is enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_149] Ensure that Secrets Manager secret is encrypted using KMS CMK
[NONE][CKV_AWS_304] Ensure Secrets Manager secrets should be rotated within 90 days
[NONE][CKV_AWS_96] Ensure all data stored in Aurora is securely encrypted at rest
[NONE][CKV_AWS_133] Ensure that RDS instances has backup policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_313] Ensure RDS cluster configured to copy tags to snapshots
[NONE][CKV_AWS_327] Ensure RDS Clusters are encrypted using KMS CMKs

[NONE][CKV_AWS_324] Ensure that RDS Cluster log capture is enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_139] Ensure that RDS clusters have deletion protection enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_250] Ensure that RDS PostgreSQL instances use a non vulnerable version with the log_fdw extension (https://aws.amazon.com/security/security-bulletins/AWS-2022-004/)

[NONE][CKV_AWS_118] Ensure that enhanced monitoring is enabled for Amazon RDS instances
[NONE][CKV_AWS_354] Ensure RDS Performance Insights are encrypted using KMS CMKs
[NONE][CKV_AWS_353] Ensure that RDS instances have performance insights enabled

skipped.message: Las CMK asimetricas (ECC) para DNSSEC no soportan rotacion automatica

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_46] Ensure AWS CloudFront Distribution with S3 have Origin Access set to enabled

skipped.message: Falso positivo; el origen es un ALB, la referencia a S3 es solo para logs

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_62] Ensure S3 buckets should have event notifications enabled

skipped.message: Bucket de solo escritura de logs de acceso, sin consumidor downstream que requiera notificaciones de eventos.

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_62] Ensure S3 buckets should have event notifications enabled
[NONE][CKV2_AWS_62] Ensure S3 buckets should have event notifications enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_18] Ensure the S3 bucket has access logging enabled

skipped.message: El bucket de logs del ALB no puede loggearse a si mismo (loop).

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_18] Ensure the S3 bucket has access logging enabled

skipped.message: El bucket de logs de CloudFront no se loggea a si mismo.

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_18] Ensure the S3 bucket has access logging enabled

skipped.message: El bucket de failover no requiere logs.

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_5] Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource

skipped.message: El SG se asocia al ALB en el modulo compute via output alb_sg_id

skipped.message: El SG se asocia a ECS Fargate en el modulo compute via output ecs_sg_id

skipped.message: El SG se asocia al RDS Proxy en el modulo data via output proxy_sg_id

skipped.message: El SG se asocia al cluster Aurora en el modulo data via output aurora_sg_id

skipped.message: El SG se asocia a ElastiCache en el modulo messaging via output redis_sg_id

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_144] Ensure that S3 bucket has cross-region replication enabled

skipped.message: Replicacion cross-region no requerida para logs de acceso efimeros.

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_144] Ensure that S3 bucket has cross-region replication enabled

skipped.message: No se requiere replicacion para logs.

skipped.message: No se requiere replicacion para failover.
